title: Make "Download All Files" file name be the pulse name
excerpt:
Currently, whenever I “download all files” from an update, it’s just “monday_attachments” and then each download after that gets appended with a number. 
I think I’m only like monday_attachments (358).zip or something li…

posts.author: zach1 (Zach)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, whenever I “download all files” from an update, it’s just “monday_attachments” and then each download after that gets appended with a number.

I think I’m only like monday_attachments (358).zip or something like that right now.

What are the chances we can get the zip file to be named whatever the pulse is?
